summary: Quarterly business review — Dana flagged concerns about adoption of the reporting dashboard.
Marcus escalated repeated SSO login failures affecting the operations team.
Renewal negotiation kickoff; discussed AI Analytics add-on as expansion path.
Elena requested a proposal for additional Growth tier seats.
Sam went quiet after pricing discussion; no response in 3 weeks.
Primary champion (former VP Eng) left the company; Tony Reyes is the new contact but not yet engaged.
